description_long: This house features a whimsical, storybook design with a steeply pitched, red-tiled gable roof and stone masonry walls. The front facade is adorned with a prominent arched entryway, a small porch with wooden steps, and decorative wooden trim under the eaves. A large animal skull with horns is displayed on the lawn, adding a rustic, fantasy element to the property. The side and rear views reveal a stone chimney, an outdoor furnace or forge, and various barrels and crates, suggesting a lived-in, functional space. Windows are small and asymmetrically placed, with some featuring wooden shutters and flower boxes. The house sits on a grassy plot, with scattered props and a shield mounted on the wall, enhancing its medieval or fantasy village character.
description: A whimsical stone and wood house with a steep red gable roof, arched entryway, and fantasy-themed outdoor decor, including a large animal skull and forge.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entryway with porch, decorative trim, shield, and animal skull on the lawn.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large animal skull, shield, and mostly blank wall with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back porch, stone chimney, and outdoor furnace or forge, with fewer decorative elements.
description_view_3: Right side view features the stone chimney, barrels, crates, and a small side window, emphasizing utility features.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched wooden door with small porch, steps, decorative trim, and overhanging roof
